programmes.show_description: (2010) Apocalyptic action-horror starring Paul Bettany. God's patience runs out and He decides to wipe humanity from the face of the Earth. Can a rebel archangel save us?

...in Their Flying Machines: (1965) Newspaper boss Robert Morley puts up a £10,000 prize for the winner of a flight from London to Paris, and soon a motley assortment of aviators is ready.
Stars Will Smith and Josh Brolin and director Barry Sonnenfeld talk about making the third sci-fi comedy adventure in the Men in Black series.
(1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?
(2016) Taraji P. Henson, Octavia Spencer and Janelle Monáe star in the Oscar-nominated, fact-based drama about three women whose genius made a significant contribution to the space race.
(2002) Tommy Lee Jones and Will Smith star in the tough action sequel to their sci-fi comedy about US government agents who secretly protect Earth from extraterrestrial criminals.
Stars Will Smith and Josh Brolin and director Barry Sonnenfeld talk about making the third sci-fi comedy adventure in the Men in Black series.
(2005) Violent action-thriller starring Jason Statham as the tough courier Frank Martin, who's hired to guard a government drugs czar's son. But his mission soon lurches towards disaster.
(1990) Liam Neeson and Frances McDormand star in Sam Raimi's crime-fighting action-fantasy. A vengeful scientist invents a synthetic skin that lets him change his appearance...
(2022) Epic Viking saga starring Alexander Skarsgård as a warrior prince who goes on the rampage to Iceland to avenge his murdered father. With Ethan Hawke, Nicole Kidman and Björk.

programmes.show_description: ...Curse of the Mummy: (2022) Animated family adventure. After Tad accidentally unleashes a curse - doh! - he and his friends must find the Emerald Tablet to save the world.
(1950) Classic comedy with James Stewart and Josephine Hull. A middle-aged eccentric insists his best friend is a six-foot invisible rabbit. And that's driving his sister to distraction.
(1954) Western with Robert Mitchum and Marilyn Monroe. An ex-con and a saloon singer steer a raft through hostile territory to face a showdown with her crooked fiancé. With Rory Calhoun.
(1962) Comedy. James Stewart's plan for a peaceful vacation with his wife Maureen O'Hara doesn't quite materialise when she hires a crumbling old house and invites the whole family along.
(2012) Sci-fi comedy sequel with Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones and Josh Brolin. Agent J travels to the 1960s to save his friend from being killed by a monstrous alien.
(2011) Thriller with Jason Statham and Donald Sutherland. A hitman is ordered to kill his mentor, but then takes on the dead man's son as an apprentice. Could get complicated... and deadly.
(2014) Tense thriller with Tom Hardy, James Gandolfini, Noomi Rapace and Matthias Schoenaerts. Two cousins get into trouble with the gangsters who use their bar to launder illicit cash.
